ddls:
CREATE TABLE "watchdog_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchdog configuration */,
  "wdp2" INTEGER /* Value of the WDP2 prescaler bit */,
  "wdp1" INTEGER /* Value of the WDP1 prescaler bit */,
  "wdp0" INTEGER /* Value of the WDP0 prescaler bit */,
  "oscillator_cycles" TEXT /* Description of the number of oscillator cycles */,
  "cycle_count" INTEGER /* Number of oscillator cycles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* A textual description of the configuration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the configuration is currently active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  "environment" TEXT /* The testing environment where the configuration is used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeouts" (
  "timeout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time-out record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the watchdog configuration */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Supply voltage at which the time-out was measured */,
  "time_out_3v" TEXT /* Typical time-out value at 3.0V */,
  "time_out_5v" TEXT /* Typical time-out value at 5.0V */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* The temperature at which the time-out was measured */,
  "humidity" REAL /* The humidity at which the time-out was measured */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the time-out measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timeouts_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES watchdog_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the watchdog configuration */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "deviation" TEXT /* Any deviation from expected results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* The environment where the test was conducted */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* The temperature during the test */,
  "test_humidity" REAL /* The humidity during the test */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES watchdog_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hardware engineer, firmware developer, QA engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the role is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the department is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the department */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test procedure */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test */,
  "procedure_steps" TEXT /* Detailed steps for conducting the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the procedure was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the procedure was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the procedure */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the procedure */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* The environment where the test procedure is applicable */,
  "test_temperature" REAL /* The temperature at which the test procedure is conducted */,
  "test_humidity" REAL /* The humidity at which the test procedure is conducted */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* The expected duration of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_procedures_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical note */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the watchdog configuration (optional) */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test (optional) */,
  "note_title" TEXT /* Title of the note */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the note */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the note is private */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_notes_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_notes_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES watchdog_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the watchdog configuration */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the change was a rollback */,
  "rollback_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the rollback, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES watchdog_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test result */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the change was a rollback */,
  "rollback_reason" TEXT /* The reason for the rollback, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_history_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the watchdog configuration (optional) */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test (optional) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., configuration change, test failure) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "handled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who handled the alert */,
  "handled_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was handled */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES watchdog_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_tests" (
  "config_test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration-test relationship */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the watchdog configuration */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* The status of the test (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_tests_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES watchdog_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_tests_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_id")
)
